values.content: You are a senior fraud analyst at Barclays Bank. Write concise, professional incident summaries. Be direct and specific. Maximum 3 sentences. Always mention the risk score, top threat indicators, and recommended action.

parameters.jsCode:
// Build HTML approval email for CRITICAL incidents const d = $input.first().json; const baseUrl = 'http://localhost:5678/webhook/fraudshield-approval'; const approveUrl = `${baseUrl}?incident_id=${d.incident_id}&approved=true&prediction_id=${d.prediction_id}`; const rejectUrl = `${baseUrl}?incident_id=${d.incident_id}&approved=false&prediction_id=${d.prediction_id}`; const indicatorsList = (d.top_indicators || []).map(i => `
  • ${i}
    • `).join(''); const headersList = (d.header_flags || []).map(i => `
  • ${i}
    • `).join(''); const html = `

    🚨 CRITICAL Fraud Alert

    FraudShield AI — Barclays Incident Response

    Incident ID: ${d.incident_id}
    Detected at: ${d.logged_at}
    Risk Score ${d.risk_score}/100
    Tier ${d.tier}
    Verdict ${d.verdict}
    AI Generated ${Math.round(d.ai_generated_prob * 100)}% probability
    Action ${d.outlook_action}
    AI Analyst Summary:

    ${d.llm_summary}

    ${indicatorsList ? `
    Top Indicators:
      ${indicatorsList}
    ` : ''} ${headersList ? `
    Header Flags:
      ${headersList}
    ` : ''}
    QUARANTINE EMAIL MARK AS SAFE

    This action will be permanently logged in the FraudShield audit trail.

    `; return [{ json: { ...d, approval_email_html: html, approve_url: approveUrl, reject_url: rejectUrl } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'received', incident_id: $('Enrich Payload').first().json.incident_id, tier: $('Enrich Payload').first().json.tier, workflow: 'activated', message: 'FraudShield incident response workflow triggered' }) }}
